overall.description: A stationary first-person perspective from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, looking up at a massive digital billboard mounted on a building in Night City. The billboard cycles through various neon advertisements with glitchy digital transitions while the camera remains fixed in an urban canyon between two buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-level urban canyon with massive digital billboard

events.description: digital billboard glitches and transitions from 'The Heavy Hearts Club' advertisement to 'NIGHT CITY' text
billboard transitions with vertical glitch scanlines to 'BARGHEST' character advertisement
billboard glitches through cityscape imagery and stabilizes on 'Paradise' neon advertisement

agents.ego_description: stationary at street level, looking up at the digital billboard between two buildings

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying cycling neon advertisements with glitch effects
dark modern building facade with horizontal window slits
concrete building with external ventilation grates and balconies

segments.scene_description: The camera remains fixed in an urban canyon at night, looking up at a massive digital billboard mounted between two buildings. The billboard cycles through various cyberpunk-style advertisements including 'The Heavy Hearts Club', 'NIGHT CITY', 'BARGHEST', and 'Paradise' with distinctive glitchy digital transitions. The surrounding buildings frame the view, with a dark facade on the left and a grated concrete structure on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a fixed first-person perspective within a dark urban canyon, focusing on a massive digital billboard that cycles through a series of vivid neon advertisements. It begins by framing the glowing screen between a dark building facade on the left and a grated concrete structure on the right. As the sequence progresses, the billboard shifts through a rapid succession of glitchy digital transitions, flashing imagery for The Heavy Hearts Club and Night City. The visual flow continues as the display pivots to advertisements for Barghest and Paradise, with the flickering neon light casting shifting colors against the surrounding architecture. The scene finally settles on these high-contrast digital displays, emphasizing the oppressive scale of the city's commercial landscape.
